name: Config Backup & Restore
description: Back up and restore n8n-claw config as downloadable JSON files

tools.name: create_backup
tools.description: Create a JSON backup of n8n-claw configuration and return a download link

tools.name: show_backup
tools.description: View contents of a backup file without restoring

tools.name: restore_backup
tools.description: Restore configuration from a backup file URL

author: freddy-schuetz
